description_long: This helicopter features a robust, angular fuselage with a camouflage paint scheme blending dark green, black, and gray tones, suggesting a military or tactical application. The main rotor is long and straight, with four blades extending symmetrically from the central hub. The cockpit is equipped with multiple large, rectangular windows, providing wide visibility for the crew, and is framed by dark, reinforced borders. The landing gear consists of sturdy, tubular skids with crossbars for stability, and the tail section is elongated with a horizontal stabilizer and a small tail rotor. Visible armaments or equipment pods are mounted on the sides, enhancing its operational capabilities. The overall design is utilitarian, with exposed mechanical details and a matte finish for reduced reflectivity.
description: A military-style helicopter with a camouflage pattern, large cockpit windows, and robust landing skids, featuring a four-blade main rotor and side-mounted equipment pods.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide cockpit windows, symmetrical rotor blades, and the robust landing skids beneath the fuselage.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated fuselage, side-mounted equipment pods, and the full length of the main and tail rotors.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the tail boom, horizontal stabilizer, and the tail rotor, with the skids and equipment pods visible on either side.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cockpit, equipment pods, and the full profile of the helicopter's body and rotors.
attribute_rotor_blades: Four long, straight main rotor blades made of composite material, dark in color, with no visible markings; each blade extends symmetrically from the central hub and appears to be approximately 6 meters in length.
attribute_tail_rotor: A small, two-blade tail rotor is mounted vertically at the end of the tail boom, dark in color, with no visible protective shroud or markings.
attribute_landing_skids: The landing skids are tubular, metallic, and painted black, with crossbars for added stability and small footpads at the ends.
attribute_cockpit_windows: The cockpit features five large, rectangular windows arranged in a wraparound configuration, with dark framing and a slight tint for glare reduction.
